2011May 22, 2011

🇺🇸 Portland, OR, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Portland, Oregon, United States, May 22, 2011 -- May 27, 2011

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2011-05-portland-oregon-usa

15 Resolutions

824Plenary
Circulate call for nominations for WG 3 Convener
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to circulate a call to P-members for nominations for the post of WG 3 Convener.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
823Plenary
Require NP ballot for Change Requests creating or significantly changing APs
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to ensure that any Change Request resulting in the creation of a new Application Protocol or AP module, or a new edition of an existing Application Protocol or AP modu...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
822Plenary
Update Standing Documents to refer to Annex SK
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to update the Standing Documents to refer to Annex SK at the next revision. Meanwhile they will continue to reference the Annex ST available at the time they were appr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
821Plenary
Change title and applicability of ISO 8000-150 and renumber to Part 50
SC 4 decides to change the title of ISO 8000-150 to "Data Quality - Part 50: Quality management framework", change the part number to 50, and no longer restrict the applicability of the standard to...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
820Plenary
Accept Jana Schey as liaison officer from Energistics
SC 4 accepts and welcomes Jana Schey as liaison officer from Energistics to SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
819Plenary
Appoint Dr. Max Ungerer as liaison officer to SASIG
SC 4 welcomes the offer of Dr. Max Ungerer to act as liaison officer to the Strategic Automotive product data Standards Industry Group (SASIG).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
818Plenary
Terminate inactive direct liaisons with EMSA and EPISTLE
SC 4 resolves to terminate its direct liaisons with the following organizations: * Marine e-Business Standards Association (EMSA) * European Process Industries Step Technical Liaison Executive (EPI...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
817Plenary
Reappoint David Loffredo as WG 11 Convener for a three-year term
SC 4 appreciates and accepts the offer of David Loffredo to serve as Convener of WG 11.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
816Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |15926-11 |Leo van Ruijven | |15926-6 |Magne Valen-Sendstad |David...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Oscar Rocha for his outstanding effort as the SC 4 liaison to SASIG since 2003.

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Alan Doniger for his efforts as the Energistics (formerly POSC) liaison representative to SC 4.

Acclamation
Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Linda Kresl for her organization of the Industry Day, and to the speakers for attending and presenting on matters of interest to the SC 4 community.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Melissa Scheib, and Kristen Wolf for their hosting and support of the 61st ISO TC 184/SC 4 Plenary meetings at the Crowne Plaza Hotel in Portland, Oregon. Special...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
